summary: Iteration 6 comprehensive testing completed. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified packages page (5 packages with correct values), schedule page (no instructor names on slots), and home page. Admin dashboard API endpoints all working correctly. Frontend admin login has a routing issue where it redirects to user login after successful admin login.

ui_bugs.issue: After successful admin login (shows 'Uspješna prijava'), user is redirected to /login instead of /admin dashboard. The ProtectedRoute component checks /api/auth/me which uses session_token cookie, but admin login sets admin_session_token cookie and stores token in localStorage.

action_items: Fix admin login frontend routing: After successful admin login, ProtectedRoute redirects to /login because it checks /api/auth/me (uses session_token cookie) but admin login uses admin_session_token cookie. Options: 1) Modify ProtectedRoute to also check admin token, or 2) Have admin login also set session_token cookie, or 3) Create separate AdminProtectedRoute
critical_code_review_comments: All backend APIs for iteration 6 features are working correctly
Package request flow works: user requests → admin approves → membership created
Financial overview calculates revenue from approved package_requests
Alerts correctly identify expiring memberships and low session counts
Schedule slot cards correctly hide instructor names (only show time and availability)
Admin login API works but frontend routing needs fix
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for iteration 6 are working. Phone OTP is MOCKED (always 123456). Admin login API works but frontend has routing issue - after successful login it redirects to /login instead of /admin. The issue is in ProtectedRoute component which checks /api/auth/me (uses session_token cookie) but admin login sets admin_session_token cookie. Packages page shows all 5 packages correctly. Schedule page correctly hides instructor names on slot cards.

mocked_apis.phone_otp: Always returns 123456 - SMS not actually sent

features_verified.packages_endpoint: Returns 5 packages: Basic(6/90), Linea Active(8/125), Linea Balance(10/145), Linea Gold(12/175), Linea Premium(16/200)
features_verified.package_request_flow: User can request package, creates pending request, admin can approve/reject
features_verified.admin_dashboard: Shows pending request count and recent requests
features_verified.admin_financial: Returns revenue overview with monthly breakdown
features_verified.admin_alerts: Returns expiring memberships and low session alerts
features_verified.admin_users: Returns users with full membership details
features_verified.freeze_unfreeze: Endpoints exist and validate membership status
features_verified.schedule_no_instructor: Slot cards do NOT show instructor names
